## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Surface:** Widget / Standalone Admin / Shopify Admin / Provider Console / API
- **Browser:** Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge
- **Tenant tier:** Starter / Professional / Enterprise
- **Version:** (check widget footer or API /health endpoint)

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or error logs.

## Severity

- [ ] P0 — Service down or data loss
- [ ] P1 — Major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] P2 — Feature broken with workaround
- [ ] P3 — Minor issue or cosmetic
